name: kin-design-engineer
description: Audit, repair, and verify frontend interfaces with the KIN contract in Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Audit and repair frontends with KIN evidence.
interface.longDescription: Turns the active Codex model into a KIN-aware design engineer: collect deterministic code candidates, confirm them against the rendered product and authoritative KIN contracts, apply authorized repairs, and report verification limits honestly.
defaultPrompt: Audit this frontend with KIN and show the evidence.
Fix the confirmed KIN issues and verify the result.
Review this page in light, dark, mobile, and Reduced Motion.
